name: Perfect Mobile Button Size: Tips, Guidelines, and Best Practices
snippet: Minimum button size should be 42 px (9×9 mm) for accessibility. Comfortable button size is around 50 px (10×10 mm), matching the fingertip area.

name: Touch Target Sizing Guidelines - LinkedIn
snippet: Increase target size: Make sure that each clickable or tappable area is at least 24x24 pixels on web, or 44x44 points for iOS and 48x48 dp for Android, so users ...

name: 5 Best Practices for Designing Effective Touch Targets in Mobile UI
snippet: The recommended minimum size for touch targets is 44x44 pixels. This size accommodates users with varying finger sizes. Avoid making buttons ...

name: Accessible Target Sizes Cheatsheet - Smashing Magazine
snippet: When designing for touch today, we need to use at least 27×27px for small links or icons in the content area and at least 44×44px for icons at ...

name: Touch Targets on Touchscreens - NN/G
snippet: Summary: Interactive elements must be at least 1cm × 1cm (0.4in × 0.4in) to support adequate selection time and prevent fat-finger errors.

name: Touch Control Design: Ways Of Playing On Mobile
snippet: This chapter serves as reference for designing touch controls that work on mobile or small touch screen devices. Missing: FPS 2024

name: Optimal Size and Spacing for Mobile Buttons - UX Movement
snippet: 42 pixels is the minimum and 72 pixels is the maximum button size that's most optimal for users. The most preferred button size was 60 pixels.

name: How to "PROPERLY" make mobile buttons - Developer Forum | Roblox
snippet: There are 2 ways you can solve this issue, mine involves with binding Render step and update the GUI position to where your touch pos is.

name: Touchscreen Input | NeoFPS Scripting Reference
snippet: NeoFPS comes with a custom touchscreen setup for games targeting mobile devices. There are input manager and input system versions of the touch controls.

name: Steam Link Touch Controller Guide - A Visual Introduction
snippet: This guide will get you started on how to use the Steam Link app's Touch Controller and how to create configs for it.
